claim_text: You can configure CORS in a FastAPI application using CORSMiddleware.

cited_text_snapshot.probe-file-upload: It's possible to upload several files at the same time. They would be associated to the same form field sent using form data. To use that, declare a list of bytes or UploadFile.

label: unsupported

claim_text: It is possible to receive duplicate headers in FastAPI.

cited_text_snapshot.probe-cors: You can configure CORS in your FastAPI application using the CORSMiddleware. Add it as middleware and configure allowed origins, methods, headers, and credentials.

label: unsupported

claim_text: OAuth2 has the notion of scopes.

cited_text_snapshot.probe-body-updates: If you want to receive partial updates, it is useful to use exclude_unset in Pydantic model_dump so only explicitly set fields are included.

label: unsupported

claim_text: Path parameters are declared as part of the URL path and are required.

cited_text_snapshot.probe-query-params: When you declare other function parameters that are not part of the path parameters, they are automatically interpreted as query parameters. Query parameters can be optional and can have defaults.

label: unsupported

claim_text: OAuth2 password bearer with JWT can encode permissions in token scopes.

cited_text_snapshot.probe-simple-oauth: OAuth2 with Password and Bearer is a simple security flow where the client sends a username and password to receive a bearer token. This section does not describe JWT scope encoding.

label: unsupported
